title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXIII. Natural History.
content:
Catch him, crow! carry him, kite!
        Take him away till the apples are ripe;
        When they are ripe and ready to fall,
        Home comes [Johnny,] apples and all.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXIII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
